assertions.expectation: Recommends Stable or Extended release channel to minimize upgrade frequency
assertions.reason: Response explicitly recommends Stable release channel and provides detailed justification: 'slowest upgrade cadence with maximum validation' and 'best balance of security patches + stability for production training'

assertions.expectation: Recommends 'no minor or node upgrades' maintenance exclusion to block disruptive upgrades while allowing security patches on the control plane
assertions.reason: Response explicitly uses '--add-maintenance-exclusion-scope no_minor_or_node_upgrades' in cluster configuration and explains that 'control plane gets security patches automatically' while 'node pools are protected from all upgrades'

assertions.expectation: Recommends a narrow maintenance window (e.g., weekends only) so CP patches happen at predictable times
assertions.reason: Response configures a specific narrow maintenance window with '--maintenance-window-recurrence "FREQ=WEEKLY;BYDAY=SA"' (Saturdays only) and a 4-hour window from 6-10 AM

assertions.expectation: Suggests isolating training workloads on dedicated GPU node pools separate from serving/infrastructure pools
assertions.reason: Response provides a detailed multi-pool strategy with separate pools: 'training-h100' for training workloads, 'inference-a100' for serving, and 'system-cpu' for infrastructure, each with different configurations

assertions.expectation: Recommends disabling auto-upgrade on GPU training node pools and upgrading manually during scheduled gaps between training runs
assertions.reason: Response explicitly sets '--enable-autoupgrade=false' for the training pool and includes procedures for 'Planned Upgrade Windows (Between Training Campaigns)' with manual upgrade commands

assertions.expectation: Advises configuring training frameworks with checkpointing so jobs can resume after any disruption
assertions.reason: Response includes 'terminationGracePeriodSeconds: 3600 # 1 hour for checkpoint save' in the StatefulSet configuration, directly addressing checkpointing for job resumption

assertions.expectation: Mentions GPU driver version testing — always validate in staging before applying to production GPU pools
assertions.reason: Response includes a 'GPU Driver Compatibility Verification' section with commands to check version mappings and explicitly states 'Test target version in staging cluster first' and 'Verify CUDA compatibility'

assertions.expectation: Notes that GPUDirect/RDMA networking has strict GKE version requirements — verify compatibility before upgrading
assertions.reason: Response does not mention GPUDirect, RDMA networking, or their specific GKE version compatibility requirements
